scenarios.description: child(index) returns correct Element on second access using cached shadowChildrenRef
scenarios.precondition: Element parent with three Element children and initial cache populated
scenarios.expectedResult: second call returns second child without recomputing shadow list
pseudocode: TEST TC08 child uses cached childElementsList

scenarios.description: child(index) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException on cached shadowChildrenRef when index out of range
scenarios.precondition: Element parent with two Element children and cache populated
scenarios.expectedResult: throws IndexOutOfBoundsException on second access with invalid index
